title: Add classifier-based auto-allow mode (parity with CC autoModeState.ts + yoloClassifier)
description:
## Summary

CC maintains a stateful auto-permission mode backed by an AI classifier:
- `utils/permissions/autoModeState.ts`: module-level state (autoModeActive, autoModeFlagCli, autoModeCircuitBroken)
- `utils/permissions/PermissionMode.ts`: 'auto' permission mode config (ant-internal only, TRANSCRIPT_CLASSIFIER feature gate)
- `utils/permissions/permissions.ts:519-927`: when mode === 'auto', runs YOLO classifier (classifyYoloAction) instead of prompting; tracks denials; falls back to prompting on threshold (3 consecutive or 20 total denials)
- Fast-paths: acceptEdits would-allow short-circuit, safe-tool allowlist short-circuit

OC has no 'auto' PermissionMode, no classifier call path, and no denial tracking.

## Behaviors missing
- autoModeActive / autoModeCircuitBroken global state
- Auto mode fast-path: acceptEdits would-allow check before classifier call
- Auto mode fast-path: isAutoModeAllowlistedTool
- Classifier invocation (classifyYoloAction) with deny tracking
- Denial tracking: consecutiveDenials >= 3 or totalDenials >= 20 → fall back to prompt
- Headless denial-limit: AbortError instead of fallback to prompt
- autoModeCircuitBroken → block re-entry

## Parent issue
#531

## References
- CC: utils/permissions/autoModeState.ts:1-39
- CC: utils/permissions/PermissionMode.ts:80-91
- CC: utils/permissions/permissions.ts:519-927
- CC: utils/permissions/denialTracking.ts:1-46
- OC: src/permissions.rs (no auto mode, no classifier, no denial tracking)
